steps.t: The Secret Stone was originally found in Moria, so that is where you must begin your search for answers. You should travel to Moria and find Frethi th…
Many secrets still lie hidden within the Foundations of Stone. You should search for a clue to the origin of the Secret Stone with Frethi.
Frethi is investigating the Crown Chamber within the Foundations of Stone. You should talk to Frethi.
